vocab.navigation: React Navigation v6. createNativeStackNavigator for screens. useNavigation() + useRoute() hooks.
vocab.loading: ActivityIndicator for spinners. FlatList with ListFooterComponent for paginated loading. Skeleton placeholders via react-native-skeleton-placeholder.
vocab.storage: AsyncStorage for simple key-value. MMKV (react-native-mmkv) for performance-critical data. Zustand + MMKV for global state persistence.
vocab.api: fetch() built-in. React Query (TanStack) for server state, caching, and background refetch.
vocab.layout: Flexbox only. StyleSheet.create() for performance. react-native-safe-area-context for notch/home indicator.
